
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for Li2 w. bond length 3.7 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...

Number of electrons: 6, Number of orbitals: 18
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).
Optimizing 11 active virtual orbitals (out of 15 total virtual orbitals).

Optimization finished. Final MP2 energy = -14.870315291575134 Hartree. (ΔE_corr = -0.016725152955501053 Hartree)
OVOS optimized orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).

OVOS optimized energy = -16.153937 Hartree @ iterations 162.

Calculating UHF reference for comparison...
